case_title: ABCO MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS INC. VS. MARINA CLEANERS, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,399.23 FILED BY ABCO MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MARINA CLEANERS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-17-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00) SERVED JAN-13-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARINA CLEANERS, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-17-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-17-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABCO MECHANICAL CONTRACTORS INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARINA CLEANERS, INC. $1,399.23 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,464.23 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SUBPOENA ISSUED TO ARCHIG G. KASHANI
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MARINA CLEANERS, INC.
THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
